title: Nash Equilibrium in the Prisoner's Dilemma
description: A decision flowchart illustrating the strategic choices and outcomes for two players in the classic Prisoner's Dilemma, highlighting the Nash Equilibrium.
elements: Player A (Choose to Confess or Remain Silent)
Player B (Choose to Confess or Remain Silent)
Payoff Matrix (Outcomes for each combination of choices)
relationships: Player A's decision leads to a branch based on Player B's choice
Player B's decision leads to a branch based on Player A's choice
The intersection of their choices in the payoff matrix defines the outcome and identifies the Nash Equilibrium (both confess)
